message:
feat: comprehensive test suite (67 tests) + fix async error handling

- Add 39 new tests covering all builtin commands (head, tail, wc,
  which, basename, dirname, whoami, date, printf, sleep, test, true,
  false, touch, cp, mv, rm, mkdir, ls -l, grep -i, env)
- Add tests for pipe edge cases (echo|wc, echo|cat), || operator,
  quoted strings, validation (path traversal, null bytes, empty
  command, invalid workspace ID), error handling (ENOENT, missing
  operands), process tracking (get by pid), CORS preflight, streaming
  read, workspace init idempotency
- Fix: await async handlers in DO fetch() to properly catch
  ValidationError (was returning 500 instead of 400)
